description: Address review feedback: add sync indicator tooltips with retry, offline-edit preservation via timestamp comparison, and write-race guard
steps: Step 1: Add write-race guard to firebaseService.js using a module-level isSaving flag that queues the latest save and discards intermediate ones
Step 2: Add meaningful tooltips to the sync status indicator in App.jsx and add a click handler on the error state that retries the sync
Step 3: Add timestamp comparison in the initialization logic so localStorage data is preserved if it is newer than Firestore data
acceptance_criteria: firebaseService.js has a write-race guard that prevents concurrent in-flight saves
The sync status indicator shows descriptive tooltips explaining each state
Clicking the error state icon retries the sync
On initialization, if localStorage has a newer lastModified timestamp than Firestore, localStorage data is used instead of Firestore data and synced up
npm run build completes without errors
verification: Run 'cd /projects/sandbox/Clear-mind && npm run build' and confirm it succeeds with no errors
findings: All three review issues addressed. Build passes with pre-existing chunk size warning (622KB).
